title: What is Evas true form
wikitext:
[]: What is Eva's true form?             Quote Post by unitM » Sun Mar 08, 2015 2:50 pm In 2, when Shinji is initiating an impact, Ritsuko mentions Eva is breaking through it's limitations, returning to its true form, and changing into condensed energy, all to grant the wish of one person(not labelled but implied to be Shinji). Question is, what is Eva's true form? Last we checked, Eva units were birthed and slotted with an accompanying soul. Their true form, from our previous knowledge, was physically comparable to a giant. They still look that way but Ritsuko sure avoids that explanation. On top of that, 01 is more fire than it is a physical being nearing the end of the Impact. So what just is Eva's true form in NTE?

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Sun Mar 08, 2015 3:10 pm (insert obvious "this is not even my final form" joke) I always thought, it was might have been one of the Adams.

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Sun Mar 08, 2015 3:15 pm Eva's true form. It's very core, monstrous and devoid of humanity SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sun Mar 08, 2015 7:07 pm God.

[]:             Quote Post by unitM » Sun Mar 08, 2015 7:22 pm ^ Why?

[]:             Quote Post by car go beep beep » Sun May 10, 2015 10:13 pm robersora wrote: (insert obvious "this is not even my final form" joke) I always thought, it was might have been one of the Adams.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sun May 10, 2015 10:19 pm Meh, it's not like an Eva is other than something that it is. Ritsuko was talking out her ass or doing the thing people do when they can't explain something but feel the need to say something anyways. Now had it become an energy being then it'd be a different story. Frankly I'm tired of energy beings at this point, they can go fuck themselves.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon May 11, 2015 3:41 am Eva's "True Form" is always something we aren't fully seeing. If we're ever shown Eva's Supposed True Form a character just have to hint we're just a bit from seeing Eva's TRUE True Form. It's a cycle. A glorious cycle.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 11, 2015 5:18 am car go beep beep wrote: Same, but wasn't eva-01 made from lilith? I remember in one of the episodes there were images showing eva unit-01 growing from lilith's legs.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Mon May 11, 2015 10:09 am ^ Yea NGE and NTE Unit 01 are diffrent. For Unit 01 in NTE I thought it was made pretty clear that it is one of the Adams because it has 3 eyes when N3I is being initiated. That's my belief anyways. As for the true form of Eva in general... In 3.0 during the scene where Kaworu reveals what Shinji did during 2.0 he explains that old life was sacrificed for new life. And as we are shown the graveyard of FOIs. So from this I assume that Eva's true form is the next step for humanity, and that happened at Toyko-3 but as we knew Kaworu stopped the Third Impact and that's why those who tried to become with "Infinity" died. 2.0 does make this confusing because it really doesn't seem like Shinji was doing much besides defying gravity and opening the Door of Guf at the end of 2.0, and then we see what he really does in 3.0 and it doesn't add up. It's almost like something else happened during the 14 year skip that we don't know about. Or rather omitting and changes in the writing of 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon May 11, 2015 10:59 am Sicarius VI wrote: It's almost like something else happened during the 14 year skip that we don't know about.

[]:             Quote Post by car go beep beep » Mon May 11, 2015 9:04 pm Reichu wrote: You're thinking of a totally different Eva-01 and Lilith.
